rationale: Go-specific BSON decoding bug with embedded structs; language-binding behavior, not a spec rule violation.
Go-specific BSON marshaling improvement for custom interfaces inside structs; language-specific API, not a spec rule.
BSON time.Time encode/decode round-trip bug; Go-specific type mapping behavior, no specific BSON spec rule cited.
Nil pointer in internal bsonx asMDoc method; internal implementation bug, not a spec rule violation.
CosmosDB compatibility issue with Count; thin description, no spec rule mentioned.
Internal refactor of RetryType field naming in driver.Operation; no spec behavior changed.
Request to expose applyOps results array; API ergonomics improvement, no spec rule requires this field be exposed.
Nil pointer panic when change stream closed concurrently; implementation/concurrency bug, no specific spec rule violated.
CI/test infrastructure improvement to automate Atlas connectivity tests; build/CI work.
Updating CMAP pool creation spec test to ignore ConnectionReadyEvent; references DRIVERS-673 spec test fix.
User support question about creating TTL index; not a driver bug or spec issue.
SDAM spec says lastWriteDate is in lastWrite sub-field; driver incorrectly parses it as top-level field.
Server selection spec requires localThresholdMS default of 15ms; driver defaults to 0ms due to unreferenced constant.
Data race in topology/pool under concurrent load; concurrency implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
User code bug (nil slice passed to Read); not a driver spec issue.
Regression: closing change stream without reading returns 'ended session was used' error; implementation regression, not a spec rule violation.
Adding FLE corpus test exhaustively enumerating BSON value type encryption; test infrastructure work referencing DRIVERS-686.
API ergonomics improvement: warn when unordered map used for sort; not a spec conformance issue.
Fixing libmongocrypt wrapper test and syncing FLE spec test files after upstream libmongocrypt changes.
Transactions spec says abortTransaction must ignore all server errors; driver did not. Also read pref mismatch in wire message.
Client.Ping ignores the read preference argument; spec-defined method should use provided read preference.
Deadlock in Topology.Connect due to recursive serversLock acquisition; concurrency implementation bug.
Cursor.All() should close implicit session; usability improvement, no specific spec rule explicitly requires auto-close.
Connection leak with change streams; implementation resource management bug, no specific spec rule violated.
BSON truncation flag not propagating correctly in DecodeContext; internal implementation bug in Go-specific API.
Find not returning all documents; thin description, likely cursor iteration user error or transient issue.
BSON struct decoder lowercases field names for matching without tags; Go-specific behavior, no BSON spec rule requires case-insensitive matching.
Nil pointer panic in pool.go during auth error handling; implementation bug in connection close logic.
Data race in Topology.String missing lock; internal concurrency bug, not a spec rule violation.
Data race in topology subscription due to in-place sort of shared topology object; concurrency bug, not a spec rule violation.
Missing MaxScan option and wrong oplogReplay field name in legacy find; minor implementation gaps during porting, thin on spec citation.
Updating sharded transaction spec tests to avoid readConcern snapshot; references DRIVERS-735 test update.
Driver incorrectly rejects 16 MiB documents; wire protocol allows documents up to maxBsonObjectSize, driver reserves excess bytes incorrectly.
ListCollectionNames doesn't close cursor it creates; resource leak in implementation, no specific spec rule violated.
Database() ignores Registry from DatabaseOptions; API implementation bug in Go-specific options handling.
SCRAM-SHA-1 auth fails against mongot with OP_QUERY; compatibility issue with non-standard server, not a standard spec violation.
Connection close logic allows double semaphore release causing panic; internal concurrency bug, not a spec rule.
Python driver more lenient with ISO8601 dates than Go driver; filed to align Go with Python's behavior.
Internal test reorganization: move integration tests to sub-package and remove env var checks; CI/build refactor.
Adding missing CRUD spec tests for aggregation pipeline in bulk write updates; Issue split from DRIVERS-744.
Disconnect takes long on paused Atlas cluster due to background heartbeat context handling; performance/implementation issue.
Nil panic on connection close during change stream aggregation; implementation bug with empty description.
FindOne decode error for interface attribute; Go-specific BSON decoder limitation, not a spec violation.
Slow connection establishment under load; performance issue in SCRAM handshake, not a spec rule violation.
Auth spec requires authentication to all server types except arbiters; driver did not comply. References DRIVERS-753.
User confusion about wrong import path for BSON package; packaging/documentation issue, not a spec violation.
FLE GA spec changes requiring driver updates; references DRIVERS-698 spec, driver needed to implement updated spec requirements.
Deprecating unused IndexOptionsBuilder API; internal API cleanup with no spec behavior involved.
Adding TryNext API for non-blocking cursor iteration on change streams; new API feature not required by spec.
Documentation request for connection pool usage; docs improvement, not a spec or driver behavior issue.
